title: AN ACT to amend Tennessee Code Annotated, Title 47 and Title 53, relative to consumer protection.
summary: As introduced, requires certain food retail establishments to use a nondigital presentation of price; prohibits a food retail establishment from using personalized algorithmic pricing; makes other changes related to food retail establishments. - Amends TCA Title 47 and Title 53.

actions.action: Assigned to s/c Banking & Consumer Affairs Subcommittee
